sacks_per_game_z.what: Sacks per game — the headline edge rusher stat
sacks_per_game_z.limits: Scheme-dependent. Some edges drop into coverage on many snaps.

qb_hits_per_game_z.what: QB hits per game — pressures beyond sacks

pressure_rate_z.what: Total pressures (sacks + QB hits) per game
pressure_rate_z.limits: Doesn't separate unblocked pressures from winning 1-on-1.

tfl_per_game_z.what: Tackles for loss per game — backfield penetration on runs
tfl_per_game_z.limits: Pass rush specialists may not set the edge on runs.

solo_tackle_rate_z.what: Solo tackles as % of total tackles
solo_tackle_rate_z.limits: Can be low for edges who funnel to help.

tackles_per_snap_z.limits: High rates can reflect poor team defense (more tackles needed).

forced_fumbles_per_game_z.what: Forced fumbles per game — strip sack ability
forced_fumbles_per_game_z.limits: Low frequency event. One play can dominate career rates.

passes_defended_per_game_z.what: Passes defended per game — tipped passes and deflections
passes_defended_per_game_z.limits: Rare for pure edge rushers. More common for OLB types who drop into coverage.

interceptions_per_game_z.limits: Very rare for DEs. One or two lucky plays can inflate this.
